name: @ninoslat1/easse
author: ninoslat1
description: Lightweight SSE adapters for your backend

scripts.release: npm version patch && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('./jsr.json')); const p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('./package.json')); j.version=p.version; fs.writeFileSync('./jsr.json', JSON.stringify(j, null, 2))" && git push --follow-tags
